Name of a sacred lake and place of pilgrimage on Mount Kailās in the Himālaya mountains (the native place of the wild geese or swans; constant allusions are made to this lake in Hindī poetry, and the haṅs or rāj-haṅs (a kind of wild goose) is described as migrating to its shores every year at the breeding season)
